leadText: Gothita (Japanese: ゴチム Gothimu) is a Psychic-type Pokémon introduced in Generation V. It evolves into Gothorita starting at level 32, which evolves into Gothitelle starting at level 41.

sections.title: Biology
sections.text: Biology [ edit | edit source ] Gothita is a small, humanoid Pokémon . A small tuft of hair sticks up from the top of its purple head, and it has two white, bow-shaped feelers on each side of the head and a third bow-shaped feeler on its neck. These ribbon-like feelers are used to amplify Gothita's psychic power, and will cause Gothita to cry if touched. It has two large blue eyes with three eyelashes on each and small red lips. Its torso is black with a white zigzagging line running horizontally through the middle. Its arms and legs are short and stubby with no visible digits. Gothita intently observes those around it, looking at something only it can see. It can become so focused that it ends up being unaware of attacks. Gothita are normally known to be innocent. It is usually quiet, but sometimes it makes muted cries, even when alone. This is believed to be Gothita communicating with invisible beings. Evolution [ edit | edit source ] Gothita evolves into Gothorita , which evolves into Gothitelle . (For specifics on this Pokémon's Evolution in the games, refer to Game data→Evolution data .) Unevolved Gothita Psychic → First Evolution Gothorita Psychic → Second Evolution Gothitelle Psychic

Pokédex entries [ edit | edit source ] This Pokémon was unavailable prior to Generation V. Generation V Unova B W : #080 Unova B2 W2 : #136 Black Their ribbonlike feelers increase their psychic power. They are always staring at something. White They intently observe both Trainers and Pokémon. Apparently, they are looking at something that only Gothita can see. Black 2 It stares intently at everything. It can become so obsessed with watching that it doesn't notice attacks. White 2 Generation VI Central Kalos #— Coastal Kalos #— Mountain Kalos #126 Hoenn #— X Their ribbonlike feelers increase their psychic power. They are always staring at something. Y They intently observe both Trainers and Pokémon. Apparently, they are looking at something that only Gothita can see. Omega Ruby Their ribbonlike feelers increase their psychic power. They are always staring at something. Alpha Sapphire They intently observe both Trainers and Pokémon. Apparently, they are looking at something that only Gothita can see. Generation VII Alola #— Kanto #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Generation VII . Generation VIII Galar #267 Isle of Armor #— Crown Tundra #051 Sinnoh #— Hisui #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Brilliant Diamond, Shining Pearl , and Legends: Arceus . Sword Though they're still only babies, there's psychic power stored in their ribbonlike feelers, and sometimes they use that power to fight. Shield Even when nobody seems to be around, Gothita can still be heard making a muted cry. Many believe it's speaking to something only it can see. Generation IX Paldea #234 Kitakami #— Blueberry #101 Lumiose #— Hyperspace #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Legends: Z-A . Scarlet This Pokémon is normally very innocent. When it is staring at something invisible, it is unblinking and utterly silent. Violet Beware of touching the ribbon-shaped feelers that control its psychic power. Gothita will begin bawling if you do. Spin-off games Pokopia #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Pokopia . sections.title: Pokédex entries
sections.text: Pokédex entries [ edit | edit source ] Episode Pokémon Source Entry BW035 Gothita Ash's Pokédex Gothita, the Fixation Pokémon. Gothita watches Pokémon and Trainers with an intense stare. Its bow-like feelers amplify its Psychic powers. BW055 Gothita Ash's Pokédex Gothita, the Fixation Pokémon. Gothita's ribbon-like feelers help it use its Psychic powers. Their wide eyes make them always appear to be staring. Episode Pokémon Source Entry XY101 Gothita Serena's Pokédex Gothita, the Fixation Pokémon. Gothita's Psychic powers are made stronger by its ribbon-like feelers. When Gothita becomes fixated on something, it's looking at something only it can see.
